description_long: This is a large, two-story barn with a prominent gable roof featuring two cupolas on top for ventilation. The exterior is clad in vertical board and batten siding, giving it a classic rural appearance. The front facade includes a wide covered porch supported by posts, a central entry door, and several windows, while the rear and sides have additional windows and utility doors. Both gable ends feature large roll-up doors, suitable for vehicle or equipment access, and one side has a small attached lean-to structure. The roof is steeply pitched, and the overall structure is robust, likely constructed from wood and metal. The barn's design is functional, with ample space for storage, livestock, or agricultural equipment.
description: A large, two-story barn with a gable roof, vertical board and batten siding, cupolas, and wide roll-up doors on both ends. Features a covered porch, multiple windows, and a side lean-to.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide covered porch, central entry door, and two cupolas on the gable roof.
description_view_1: Gable end with a large roll-up door, concrete ramp, and a small utility door to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with evenly spaced windows and exterior lighting fixtures, no porch or main entry.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end with another large roll-up door, a side lean-to, and visible roof vent.
attribute_door_style: two large roll-up doors on each gable end, one standard entry door under the porch
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple rectangular windows evenly spaced along both long sides, with additional windows on the gable ends
